hero_subtitle: Collection of classic mini board games for relaxed entertainment.
export_stats_desc: Download your game statistics to backup or share with friends.
stats_storage_note: Note: Statistics are stored locally in your browser. Clearing browser data will delete them.
invite_desc: Challenge a friend to play together!
game_connect4_desc: Connect four discs in a row.
game_tetris_desc: Stack falling blocks and clear lines.
game_minesweeper_desc: Find all mines without detonating them.
game_mahjong_desc: Match pairs of tiles to clear the board.
game_puzzle_desc: Arrange tiles in the correct order.
game_bubble_desc: Shoot bubbles and pop matching colors.
rules_memory: Flip cards to reveal symbols. Find all matching pairs before running out of moves. The fewer moves you take, the higher your score!
rules_connect4: Take turns dropping colored discs into the grid. First player to connect four discs horizontally, vertically, or diagonally wins!
rules_dots: Draw lines between adjacent dots to complete boxes. Each box you complete gives you an extra turn. The player with most boxes wins!
rules_tictactoe: Players take turns marking spaces in a 3x3 grid. The first player to get three marks in a row (horizontal, vertical, or diagonal) wins!
rules_simon: Watch the light sequence and repeat it by pressing the matching buttons. The sequence gets longer each round. How far can you go?
rules_slider: Slide tiles into the empty space to arrange them in order from 1 to 15. The empty space should end up in the bottom-right corner!
rules_lights: Click any light to toggle it and its neighbors. Your goal is to turn off all lights. Click the same light twice to undo!
rules_whack: Moles pop up randomly from holes. Hit them as quickly as possible before they hide. Don't miss any!
rules_snake: Control the snake to eat food and grow longer. Avoid hitting walls or your own tail. The longer you survive, the higher your score!
rules_2048: Slide numbered tiles to merge matching numbers. Combine 2s to make 4s, 4s to make 8s, and so on until you reach 2048!
rules_wordle: Guess the hidden five-letter word in six attempts. After each guess, the letters will change color to show how close you are!
rules_spot: Two similar images are shown side by side. Find all the differences hidden between them within the time limit!
rules_hex: Drag and drop hexagon pieces into the grid. Fit them perfectly without gaps or overlaps. Clear all pieces to win!
rules_chess: The classic game of kings and queens. Move your pieces strategically to checkmate your opponent's king. White plays first!
rules_sudoku: Fill the 9x9 grid so that each row, column, and 3x3 box contains all digits from 1 to 9. No repeats allowed!
rules_tetris: Move and rotate falling tetromino pieces to complete horizontal lines. Complete lines disappear and you score points. The game speeds up as you progress. Game ends when pieces stack to the top.
rules_minesweeper: Click cells to reveal them. Numbers show how many mines are adjacent. Right-click to flag suspected mines. Clear all safe cells to win!
rules_mahjong: Click two matching tiles to remove them. Only free tiles (not covered, with at least one side open) can be selected. Clear all tiles to win!
rules_puzzle: Slide tiles into the empty space to arrange them in numerical order from 1 to 15, with the empty space at the end.
rules_bubble: Aim and shoot bubbles from the bottom. Match 3 or more of the same color to pop them. Don't let the bubbles reach the bottom!
rules_home: Welcome to Tablo! Select a game from the grid below to start playing. Enjoy!
share_text_spot: Playing Spot the Difference on Tablo!
footer_privacy_badge: Open Source · No Tracking · No Ads · Privacy First
